THE JUDGMENT SUM COMPRISES THE FOLLOWING: $214,008.00 GENERAL DAMAGES; $27,080.60 INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM FROM DECEMBER 19, 2019; $21,853.00 ATTORNEYS FEES FROM DECEMBER 19, 2019; ($55,000.00) PAYMENTS MADE BY DEFENDANT. $207,941.60 TOTAL AMOUNT OF JUDGMENT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
